name: palinex
description: Render a2ui v0.9 surfaces inline in Claude Desktop as sandboxed iframes.
long_description: Palinex wraps a2ui v0.9 surface payloads as MCP UI resources so Claude Desktop renders them inline. Exposes a single tool, render_surface, that takes a surface payload and returns a ui:// resource pointing at the palinex renderer. Optional nexus integration resolves chash references in the payload against nexus T3 when conexus is also installed.
